name: Matthew Kenney's Red Lettuce Salad W/Spiced Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 pound red leaf lettuces (romaine, radicchio, lolla rosa, etc.)
10 ounces Parmesan, Asiago, or Manchego, grated
Plus 4 paper-thin slices of cheese choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Roast almonds in a pan for about 30-40 minutes, until golden brown. Check and toss every 15 minutes.
3. Remove almonds and let cool to room temperature.
4. In a bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, paprika, cayenne pepper, and cloves.
5. When nuts are cool, drizzle lightly with honey and toss with the spice mixture. Sprinkle the spice mix on the nuts; toss again until the nuts are covered evenly.
6. Return the nuts to the oven at 400°F for 5-10 minutes. Let cool.
7. Reserve half of the nuts for serving; store the remaining nuts for another use.
8. In a bowl, mix lettuces, chives, olives, and reserved almonds.
9. Lightly stir in dressing.
10. Toss with grated cheese.
11. Divide salad among 4 plates. Top each with a slice of cheese and a sprinkle of pepper.
